steps.detail: Pour 2× coffee weight (e.g. 30g water for 15g coffee). Wait 30 seconds for CO₂ to release.
Pour in slow spirals from center outward up to 40% total water. Keep steady pace.
Continue pouring in circular motion up to 70% of total water weight.
Finish pouring remaining water. Total should reach target weight.
Allow coffee to finish dripping through the filter completely.
Add coarsely ground coffee to the French Press carafe.
Pour hot water over grounds. Stir gently to saturate all grounds evenly.
Set the lid on top with the plunger pulled all the way up. Do not press yet.
Press the plunger down slowly and steadily over 20–30 seconds.
Pour immediately to prevent over-extraction.
Insert filter, wet it, attach cap to chamber. Place over sturdy mug.
Add finely-medium ground coffee into the AeroPress chamber.
Add a small amount of water (2× coffee weight), stir, and wait 20 seconds.
Fill chamber with remaining water. Stir 10 times for even extraction.
Insert plunger and press down steadily over 20–30 seconds. Stop when you hear a hiss.
Add extra-coarse ground coffee to a large jar or cold brew vessel.
Pour cold (room temperature or refrigerator-cold) filtered water over grounds. Stir to combine.
Cover the vessel tightly and place in refrigerator.
After 12 hours (or up to 24 for stronger), strain through a fine mesh filter or coffee filter.
Serve over ice. Dilute 1:1 with water or milk if concentrate is too strong.
Fill the bottom chamber with hot water just below the pressure valve.
Fill the filter basket with finely ground coffee. Level off — do not tamp.
Screw the top chamber on tightly. Place on medium-low heat.
Listen for a bubbling/gurgling sound. Coffee will start flowing into the top chamber.
Remove from heat when you hear sputtering. Serve immediately.
Place Chemex filter (3-layer side toward spout), wet thoroughly, and discard rinse water.
Add medium-coarse ground coffee to the filter.
Pour 2× coffee weight in a slow spiral. Wait 45 seconds.
Slowly pour in concentric circles, keeping water level consistent. Don't touch the filter walls.
All water should drain through by 4 minutes. Remove filter and serve.
